name: Vocational Rehab for Chemical Disabilities in North Salt Lake

mainEntity.name: Can I get vocational rehab for chemical-induced disability in North Salt Lake?
mainEntity.text: Can I get vocational rehab for chemical-induced disability in North Salt Lake?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Utah pays retraining if 90%+ unemployable post-exposure disability.

suggestedAnswer.text: North Salt Lake claims: assess via rehab counselor. Covers tuition/tools up to 2 yrs. Insurers resist—prove via functional capacity eval. Boosts settlement value; complete for TTD extension.

description: Yes, Utah pays retraining if 90%+ unemployable post-exposure disability.
